nasb.text: So the men pursued them on the road to the Jordan to the fords; and as soon as those who were pursuing them had gone out, they shut the gate.

esv.text: So the men pursued after them on the way to the Jordan as far as the fords. And the gate was shut as soon as the pursuers had gone out.

cnv.text: 那些人就沿著往約旦河的路上追趕他們，直到渡口；追趕的人一出城，城門就關上了。

ccb.text: 搜查的人便沿着通往约旦河渡口的路追去，他们一出城，城门便关闭了。
